pr.title: feat: Google Places API competitor auto-fetch in Demographics module
pr.body: Adds a "Search Laundromats via Google" button to the Demographics trade area form that automatically fetches nearby competitor laundromats using the Google Places API (New) and populates the competitor count field. ## How it works 1. **ZIP → coordinates** — Uses the free [Zippopotam.us](https://api.zippopotam.us) API (no key required) to convert the entered ZIP code to a lat/lng centroid. If the user has already entered manual coordinates, those are used instead. 2. **Nearby search** — Calls the [Google Places API (New) Nearby Search](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/nearby-search) endpoint (`POST https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchNearby`) with `includedTypes: ["laundry"]` and the selected trade area radius (1, 3, or 5 miles converted to meters). 3. **Auto-populate** — The competitor count field is instantly filled with the count of laundromat results. The names and star ratings of each found competitor are shown in a scrollable list inside the form. 4. **Competitor chart** — The `CompetitorChart` component now shows the Google-fetched competitor names and ratings when available, replacing the "enter manually" prompt. ## Files changed | File | Change | |------|--------| | `src/utils/placesApi.js` | New — `geocodeZip()`, `searchNearbyLaundromats()`, `fetchCompetitorCount()` | | `src/components/demographics/AddressForm.jsx` | Added Google Places panel with key field, search button, result list | | `src/components/demographics/DemographicCharts.jsx` | `CompetitorChart` shows fetched place names + ratings | | `src/components/demographics/DemographicsModule.jsx` | Passes `competitorPlaces` through to chart | ## Getting a Google Maps API key 1. Go to [console.cloud.google.com](https://console.cloud.google.com) 2. Create or select a project 3. Enable **Places API (New)** under APIs & Services 4. Create an API key under Credentials 5. (Recommended) Add an HTTP referrer restriction to your domain Free tier: Google provides **$200/month** in free credit, which covers approximately **5,000+ Nearby Search requests** per month. > Note: The Google Places API (New) supports CORS from browser requests — no backend proxy is needed.
pr.author: getum06
